grant_title: Corporate Grants for Nonprofits in Stamford, Connecticut
geographic_restrictions: Primarily Stamford, Connecticut, with some national or broader geographic eligibility depending on the specific grant program.
project_area: Human & Social Services, Environment, Education, Community Development, Health & Medicine, Disaster Relief, Arts & Culture, Economic Services, and more.
demographic_requirements: Varies by grant; some prioritize underserved communities, children, youth, or specific populations like homeless individuals or domestic violence survivors.
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations, public schools, and government entities with 501(c)(3) status or equivalent are generally eligible. Some grants require IRS 501(c)(3) certification, while others may have additional criteria such as geographic proximity to the funder or specific project focus areas.
